questions.question_text: A ladder is leaning against a wall. The foot of the ladder is 3 meters away from the wall, and the ladder reaches a height of 4 meters on the wall. How long is the ladder?
A rectangular park has a length of 10 meters and a width of 24 meters. What is the length of the diagonal path across the park?
A right triangle has one leg measuring 9 meters and the hypotenuse measuring 15 meters. What is the length of the other leg?
A square has a side length of 5 meters. What is the length of the diagonal of the square?
A kite is flying 20 meters above the ground. The string of the kite is anchored 15 meters away from the point directly below the kite. How long is the string?
